gate.title: Not available yet
gate.description: The staff area isn't open yet.

missing.title: Staff not found
missing.description: This chief isn't on your team.

columns.levelsTooltip: U23 covers Academy riders and young pros up to 25; Senior covers riders 26 and up. A chief's coaching group focus shows which age group they train best, on top of their coaching dimensions.

effect.body: This chief's overall rating ({rating}) drives how much of the facility's effect is realised. The Training Center is active in-game today; the others are coming soon and show what they will do once they go live.

history.body: Contract history and tenure will appear here once staff contracts land.

public.limitedNote: This is another manager's staff, so only rating and top specialization are visible. The full ability breakdown is only shown to the owning team.

release.title: Release {name}?
release.body: The contract ends immediately. You'll pay severance now, and the role is open for a new hire right away.

errors.staff_not_found: This staff member isn't on your team anymore.
errors.insufficient_funds: You can't afford the severance ({amount} CZ$).
errors.auth: You need to be signed in to do that.
errors.network: Connection failed. Try again in a moment.
errors.failed: Couldn't release this staff member. Try again in a moment.
